creator: mitchellogden13@gmail.com
text:
This port needs to be updated correctly. I had previously reached out here: https://serverfault.com/questions/1114748/jackett-pkg-outdated-is-it-possible-to-manually-install-the-latest-update/1114891#
However, the issue was not fixed and now the port does not work correctly. When I try to install, it continues to install many many packages for 30+ minutes or fails on the first/second package.
